game.title: PhoneGuessr
game.meta.title: PhoneGuessr - Daily Phone Guessing Game
game.meta.description: Identify phones from cropped photos. One puzzle per day.
result.signInPrompt: Sign in to save your score to the leaderboard!
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in to sync your stats across devices
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No entries yet. Be the first to solve today's puzzle!
about.title: PhoneGuessr
about.rule1: A mystery phone image is hidden behind blocks
about.rule2: Type a phone name and select from the suggestions
about.rule3: Each wrong guess reveals more of the image
about.rule4: Guess correctly in as few tries as possible
about.rule6: A new puzzle is available every day
about.scoringText: Your score is based on time plus a 10-second penalty per wrong guess. Lower is better. Sign in to appear on the leaderboard!
about.imageSource: Phone images sourced from manufacturer press kits
